exclusions: Pre-existing conditions declared at time of application are excluded from coverage.
Death or disability resulting from war, terrorism, or nuclear hazard is excluded.

fine_print_clauses.text: Pre-existing conditions declared at time of application are excluded from coverage.
No claim shall be payable for any disability or death arising directly or indirectly from any pre-existing condition not disclosed at time of application.
A waiting period of 90 days applies to critical illness claims from the policy commencement date.
Coverage excludes participation in hazardous activities including but not limited to motorsports, skydiving, and mountaineering above 4000m.
